title: stelis ciliatissima
intro: Stelis ciliatissima is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, characterized by its small, delicate white flowers and slender stems. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic compounds. The health benefits of Stelis ciliatissima include relief from coughs, colds, and sore throats, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and can also be smoked or used as a topical ointment to harness its medicinal properties.
